name_cn:
Top-tier factory with full packaging
❤️❤️Lady Dior 3-Compartment Embroidery Beaded Gold, lined with sheepskin, composed of 27 different sizes of beads, classic and timeless design, intricate patterns, embellished with rhinestones and white round beads. Light gold metal D.I.O.R. charm adds a touch of movement to the exquisite silhouette. Mini style, detachable chain strap, can be carried by hand or worn crossbody, the perfect companion for evening wear. Detachable chain strap, internal zip pocket, can be paired with other embroidered straps, dimensions: 17 x 15 x 7 cm
